basicInfo.name: Nightmare Leo
basicInfo.flavor: After losing to Yuri, Leo met Kris, who offered him tremendous power. He's now returned to the desert to seek revenge against the Foxes.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Slice and Dice
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 230% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Defense Reduction. [Duration: 5 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 230% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Lion's Roar
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 120% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Beastly Endurance
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Death Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Death Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story: Leo is a lion beastkin that belongs to one of the many nomadic tribes that live around Fox's Oasis. However, once the Power of Destruction began spreading throughout Asgar, he was able to claim some of this power for himself and set his sights on taking over the whole of Fox's Oasis.\nHe had been in conflict with Yuri and the other foxes for quite a while, but he was eventually defeated by Evan and his crew in exchange for information from Yuri.
